passives.name: Going Sledding
passives.effects: {{tip|Slow|Slowing}} or {{tip|immobilize|immobilizing}} an enemy champion causes you and the {{tt|most wounded|Lowest health percent}} allied champion within 1500 units to gain {{as|20% '''bonus''' movement speed}} decaying over {{fd|2.5}} seconds and {{as|{{pp|50 to 230 for 13|1;7 to 18|type=your level}}|hp}} {{as|'''bonus''' health}} for {{fd|2.5}} seconds.
Receives diminishing gold from excessive minion kills.

active.name: Ward
active.effects: Consumes a charge to place a {{tip|Stealth Ward}} at the target location, which grants {{tip|sight}} of the surrounding area. Charges refill upon visiting the shop.

effects_structured.raw: Slowing or immobilizing an enemy champion grants you and the most wounded allied champion within 1500 units 20% bonus movement speed (decays over 2.5s) and bonus health for 2.5s (30s cooldown).
Receives diminishing gold from excessive minion kills.

modifiers.post_5_minutes_gold_reduction_formula_no: 50% + 1% per minion kill starting from 20 kills, capped at 50 kills

effects_structured.raw: Consume a ward charge to place a Stealth Ward at target location (600 range). Charges refill at shop.
Warding charges refill upon visiting the shop.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Solstice Sleigh is modeled as an engage-support utility item: crowd-control procs grant brief speed plus bonus health to self and the lowest-health nearby ally.

Support-income diminishing minion-gold behavior now encodes page-verified threshold formulas and reduction ranges (pre-5-minutes and post-5-minutes), while exact per-minute windowing and team support-item dynamics remain shared-rule dependencies.
Quality normalization (2026-02-24): missing parse_confidence metadata on ward utility branches was backfilled after manual review.
Wave 120 (2026-02-25): `on_activate` entries with no fixed cooldown now use explicit `activation_cadence` schema (support ward-charge shop-refill model).

sources.used_for: local ingestion snapshot used during structured effect authoring
